overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a cowboy character walking through a rural farmland setting toward a large green Victorian farmhouse. The character approaches the house from the dirt road, enters through a wooden gate, walks up a stone garden path, and then circles around the right side of the house under an overcast stormy sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy dirt road toward the farmhouse

notable_agents.action: wooden wagon with large wheels parked stationary on the roadside

entered.detail: muddy dirt path with visible wagon wheel ruts
two-story green wooden Victorian house with white trim and wraparound porch
wooden freight wagon with red wheels parked beside the road
split-rail wooden fence running along the left side of the road
rocky mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy dirt road through open farmland, approaching a large green Victorian farmhouse. A wooden freight wagon sits parked on the right side of the road, while split-rail fences line the path and distant mountains rise under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse garden entrance with stone pathway

events.description: passing through wooden archway gate from open dirt road into enclosed garden space

agents.ego_description: walking through the property gate and proceeding up the stone garden path toward the house entrance

entered.detail: rustic wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the farmhouse property
stepping stone pathway leading through the garden to the front porch
flowering bushes with red and pink blooms lining the path
white painted picket fence bordering the garden area

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a wooden archway gate into a garden area, walking up a stone path lined with rose bushes and white picket fences. The farmhouse looms larger ahead as the dirt road and wagon fall behind, and the mountains become obscured by the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmhouse side yard with utility area and grass

events.description: reaching the front porch steps then turning right to walk around the side of the house

agents.ego_description: circling around the right side of the farmhouse, passing the wagon again on the left side

entered.detail: covered front porch with white railings and wooden steps
grassy yard area alongside the house with scattered plants
same wooden freight wagon now visible on the left side of the house
wooden telephone poles with crossbars and wires
stacked wooden barrels near a side door of the house

segments.scene_description: After reaching the front porch, the character turns right and walks along the side of the house through grassy yards. The wooden wagon reappears on the left side as the character circles the building, passing utility poles and wooden barrels near a side entrance while the house wall dominates the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural road toward the intimate perimeter of a large green Victorian farmhouse. It begins with the character walking along a muddy dirt road through farmland, passing a parked freight wagon and split-rail fences with distant mountains visible under an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a wooden archway gate into a garden, where the open road is replaced by a stone path lined with rose bushes and white picket fences. The camera then follows the character to the front porch before turning right to circle the building through grassy yards. Finally, the view expands along the side of the house, passing utility poles and wooden barrels as the freight wagon reappears on the left and the farmhouse wall dominates the frame.
